mapper.sql: t.id, t.user_id, m.idno, m.lianghao, t.type, t.subtype, t.current_score, cfg.score AS base_score, cfg.max_limit, cfg.status, cfg.order_num, cfg.constitute_show, t.update_time, ( SELECT d.credit_score FROM t_member_details d WHERE d.user_id = t.user_id AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS total_credit_score
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_member_credit_score_type t LEFT JOIN t_member m ON m.id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN t_credit_score_type_config cfg ON cfg.type = t.type AND cfg.subtype = t.subtype AND cfg.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
